prompt: A massive surreal ocean wave made of skyscrapers, each building individually tilting upward, yet the entire wave structure curves downward as a whole. Hyper-realistic lighting, cinematic sunset, reflections, volumetric fog, ultra-detailed architecture, paradoxical geometry, 8K resolution, photorealistic, dramatic composition, no text, no charts.
visual_logic: Individual buildings tilt upward locally, but the entire city wave curves downward globally, creating a contradiction between local and global trends.
